name: ServiceNow
description: Connect to ServiceNow to sync incidents, change requests, users, and CMDB items into Shielva.

install_fields.label: Instance Name
install_fields.description: Your ServiceNow instance name (e.g. 'dev12345' from dev12345.service-now.com).

install_fields.label: Username
install_fields.description: ServiceNow username with read access to incidents and change requests.

install_fields.label: Password
install_fields.description: Password for the ServiceNow user account.
